nodes.summary: semantic annotation object on every merge-required plan entry (kind, description, verification_hints)
kind field from closed set: function-added, function-removed, variable-changed, source-directive-added, structural-change
static diff analysis detects shell function adds/removes, variable changes, source directive additions
per-entry annotation generation failures fall back to structural-change without aborting plan generation
semantic annotation serialized in upgrade_plan.json; upgrade_plan.schema.json updated
upgrade_summary.md renders semantic.description and verification_hints for each merge-required entry
upgrade_apply.json carries semantic annotation on merge-required result items; schema updated
annotation generation must not execute file content; static regex/line-by-line only
plan generation logs merge-required count, auto-annotated count, structural-change fallback count
per-entry failures caught and fallback applied; semantic field addition is backward-compatible
annotation readable from existing artifacts without new CLI; kind enum documented in reference docs
function-added: upgrade_plan.json includes semantic.kind=function-added, description naming function, verification hint
variable-changed: upgrade_plan.json includes semantic.kind=variable-changed, description naming var+value, verification hint
no-match: upgrade_plan.json includes semantic.kind=structural-change with manual review hint
annotation generation error: plan completes; affected entry carries structural-change; others unaffected
upgrade_plan.json with merge-required entries validates against updated schema with semantic object populated
upgrade_summary.md renders semantic.description and full verification_hints for each merge-required entry
upgrade_apply.json carries semantic annotation on result items with planned_action=merge-required
